summary: Comprehensive testing of Mastermeatbox e-commerce platform completed. All 33 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI testing verified admin login, discount codes management, checkout flow with discount codes, and mutual exclusivity enforcement. Fixed 2 backend bugs during testing: datetime comparison issue and HTTPException handling in checkout endpoint.

fixed_during_testing.issue: TypeError comparing offset-naive and offset-aware datetimes when validating expired codes
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added timezone handling to make naive datetimes aware before comparison

fixed_during_testing.issue: HTTPException for mutual exclusivity was being caught by generic Exception handler and returned as 500 instead of 400
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added explicit HTTPException catch block to re-raise it properly

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is well-structured with proper auth, CRUD operations, and Stripe integration
Discount code validation handles all edge cases: expired, inactive, max uses, min purchase
Mutual exclusivity between Subscribe & Save and discount codes is properly enforced in both backend and frontend
Frontend properly disables discount input when Subscribe & Save items are in cart
seed_data_creation: Test discount codes created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs tested and working. Discount code CRUD, validation, and checkout integration all functional. Mutual exclusivity between Subscribe & Save and discount codes enforced correctly. Frontend admin CMS and checkout flow verified. Stripe checkout creates sessions successfully.

frontend: Discount Codes tab and manager UI - PASSED
Product listing and SHOP NOW buttons - PASSED
Cart sidebar with item display - PASSED
Checkout page with discount code input - PASSED
Apply discount code - PASSED (shows discount amount and updated total)
Mutual exclusivity warning on checkout - PASSED (input disabled with warning message)
